<noinclude>
{{See also|:Template:Folk costumes}}
</noinclude>{{Navbox
|name = Japanese clothing
|title = [[Japanese clothing]]
|image = [[File:Ch5 wakamurasaki2.jpg|80px]]
<!-- file:ch5 wakamurasaki.jpg is less tightly cropped -->
|listclass = hlist

|above = [[List of items traditionally worn in Japan]]

|group1 = Traditional
|list1 =
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Chihaya (clothing)|Chihaya]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Fundoshi]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Furisode]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Hanten]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Hakama]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Haori]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Happi]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Jinbei]]}}

* {{transliteration|ja|[[Jūnihitoe]]}}

* [[Kimono]]

* {{transliteration|ja|[[Mawashi]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Mino (straw cape)|Mino]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Nemaki]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Samue]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Shitagi]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Sokutai]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Uwagi]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Yukata]]}}

|group2 = Headgear
|list2 =
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Benkan]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Hachimaki]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Kanmuri (headwear)|Kanmuri]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Kanzashi]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Kasa (hat)|Kasa]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Raikan]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Shaguma]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Tenugui]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Tokin (headwear)|Tokin]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Tsunokakushi]]}}

|group3 = Belt{{\}}sash
|list3 =
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Obi (sash)|Obi]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Uwa-obi]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Tasuki (sash)|Tasuki]]}}

|group4 = Footwear
|list4 =
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Geta (footwear)|Geta]]}}

|below =

}}<noinclude>

[[Category:Japan arts and culture navigational boxes|Clothing]]
</noinclude>

{{See also|:Template:Folk costumes}}
</noinclude>{{Navbox
|name = Japanese clothing
|title = [[:en:Japanese clothing|Japanese clothing]]
|image = [[File:Ch5 wakamurasaki2.jpg|80px]]
<!-- file:ch5 wakamurasaki.jpg is less tightly cropped -->
|listclass = hlist

|above = [[:en:List of items traditionally worn in Japan|List of items traditionally worn in Japan]]

|group1 = Traditional
|list1 =
* {{transliteration|ja|[[:en:Chihaya (clothing)|Chihaya]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[:en:Fundoshi|Fundoshi]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[:en:Furisode|Furisode]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[:en:Hanten|Hanten]]}}

* {{transliteration|ja|[[:en:Haori|Haori]]}}

* {{transliteration|ja|[[Jōe]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[:en:Jūnihitoe|Jūnihitoe]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[:en:Keikogi|Keikogi]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[:en:Kosode|Kosode]]}}
* [[:en:Kimono|Kimono]]
* {{transliteration|ja|[[:en:Kyahan|Kyahan]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[:en:Mawashi|Mawashi]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Mino (straw cape)|Mino]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Nemaki]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Samue]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Shitagi]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Sokutai]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Uwagi]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Yukata]]}}

|group2 = Headgear
|list2 =
* {{transliteration|ja|[[:en:Benkan|Benkan]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[:en:Hachimaki|Hachimaki]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[:en:Kanmuri (headwear)|Kanmuri]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[:en:Kanzashi|Kanzashi]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[:en:Kasa (hat)|Kasa]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Raikan]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Shaguma]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Tenugui]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Tokin (headwear)|Tokin]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Tsunokakushi]]}}

|group3 = Belt{{\}}sash
|list3 =
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Obi (sash)|Obi]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Uwa-obi]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Tasuki (sash)|Tasuki]]}}

|group4 = Footwear
|list4 =
* {{transliteration|ja|[[:en:Geta (footwear)|Geta]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[:en:Jika-tabi|Jika-tabi]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Okobo]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Tabi]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Uwabaki]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Waraji]]}}
* {{transliteration|ja|[[Zōri]]}}

|below =

}}<noinclude>
{{navbox documentation}}
[[Category:Clothing navigational boxes]]
[[Category:Japan arts and culture navigational boxes|Clothing]]
</noinclude>
